About & education

I'm a third-year Computer Science student who spends as much time shipping products as studying for them — 8+ full-stack and AI projects, a full-stack internship at Saiket Systems, and a running habit of building at weekend hackathons. I care about clean APIs, responsive interfaces, and AI features that genuinely help the person on the other end.

Right now I'm exploring agentic AI, 3D web experiences, and applied machine learning, while volunteering as a Cloud Team member at GDG On Campus and serving as Joint Secretary of the Indian Data Science Club at REVA University.
